questions.question: Describe the difference between a pushdown automaton (PDA) and a Turing machine. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the control structures and their limitations

questions.question: What is the basic difference between a regular expression and a context-free grammar? Provide an example to demonstrate your answer.
questions.hint: Use simple examples to explain the concepts clearly

questions.question: Explain the concept of a minimal automaton. How does it differ from a finite automaton? Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the minimization process and its implications
